    Loading…
    Main Street Tacos is a casual Mexican restaurant in Wauconda, Illinois, known for its authentic, made-to-order tacos, burritos, and other comfort food, with popular items including fish, steak, and chorizo tacos, and guacamole. It offers counter service with food delivered to your table, and while it's not a fancy sit-down place, many find the food tasty and reasonably priced, though some reviews mention inconsistent service and a lack of free chips and salsa. 
    Links
      +3
      Main Street Tacos is a casual Mexican restaurant in Wauconda, Illinois, known for its authentic, made-to-order tacos, burritos, and other comfort food, with popular items including fish, steak, and chorizo tacos, and guacamole. It offers counter service with food delivered to your table, and while it's not a fancy sit-down place, many find the food tasty and reasonably priced, though some reviews mention inconsistent service and a lack of free chips and salsa. 
      What to expect
      • Cuisine: Authentic Mexican comfort food, with a focus on tacos. 
      • Popular dishes: Fish tacos, steak tacos, chorizo tacos, and guacamole are frequently praised. 
      • Service style: Counter service where you order and pay at the counter, with food brought to your table. 
      • Atmosphere: Simple and casual, with TVs playing Spanish programming. 
      • Note: They do not offer free chips and salsa, which is a point of feedback in some reviews. 
      What customers say
      • Positive:
        Many enjoy the fresh, flavorful food, especially the fish and steak tacos, and find it a good value. 
      • Negative:
        Some customers have reported poor customer service experiences, including confrontational staff and issues with billing for chips.

        People say this Mexican restaurant serves delicious tacos, especially the al pastor and steak. They also highlight the generous portions, reasonable prices, and quick service.
        Other reviews mention the dining area can be simple.
